# bitbucketdc_projects (Data Source)

Lists all Bitbucket Data Center projects accessible to the authenticated user.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `filter` (String) Optional substring to filter projects by name (case-insensitive).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Static identifier for this data source.
- `projects` (Attributes List) List of matching projects. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--projects))

<a id="nestedatt--projects"></a>
### Nested Schema for `projects`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) The project description.
- `id` (String) The project key (same as key).
- `key` (String) The project key.
- `name` (String) The display name of the project.
- `public` (Boolean) Whether the project is publicly accessible.
